title: Caprioril

'''Caprioril''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], near [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]]. It was the site of the infamous [[Caprioril Massacre]].

==History==
===Galactic Republic and Imperial era===
Caprioril was a mostly tranquil world known for its [[Podracing/Legends|podraces]] and [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop races]], although podraces were officially banned in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]].<ref name="HoloNet 45" /> Caprioril was the site of an infamous [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] tragedy, in which a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] slaughtered 20,000 [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoids]] and [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] at a swoop arena in a massive explosion, including famous racer, [[Ignar Ominaz]]. The droid's goal was the assassination of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Amel Bakli]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> Famous swoop racers on Caprioril included [[Serji-X Arrogantus]] and [[Hodrix]].<ref name="Arrogantus" />

As of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Caprioril was governed by [[Proconsul]] [[Shren Whist]].<ref name="HoloNet 45" />

===New Republic era===
[[File:MaraJadeVsLumiya.jpg|thumb|left|[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] [[Confrontation on Caprioril|engages]] [[Lumiya]] on Caprioril.]]
{{Quote|I was Merellis, a come-up flector for a swoop gang on Caprioril. That's where I was when a female cyborg found me.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] to [[Tionne Solusar|Tionne]]|<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>}}
Caprioril was named a sector capital by the New Republic.<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|107|Caprioril}}</ref>

Sometime between the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] briefly worked under the name [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Marellis]] as a [[come-up flector]] for a Caprioril [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]].<ref name="DFR">''[[Dark Force Rising]]''</ref> During this period, she encountered and [[Confrontation on Caprioril|dueled]] [[Lumiya]], who was sent by [[Ysanne Isard]] on Caprioril to bring Jade back under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] service.<ref name="TEP" />

During the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] [[Operation Shadow Hand|reappearance]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], the planet was [[Siege of Caprioril|besieged]] by the [[Dark Empire]] from the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]. In the weeks following the siege, the New Republic released the [[textfile]] "[[Why Do We Fight the Empire?]]"<ref name="DESB" />

Around the time of the siege, New Republic [[Historian/Legends|historian]] [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] survived an assassination attempt while visiting Caprioril,<ref name="TCSWE" /> during which his leg was injured.<ref name="Eyewitness">{{WEGCite|story=Eyewitness to Apocalypse|book=Dark Empire Sourcebook}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly names the planet "Caprionril."<ref name="Rebellion">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref>
